hero.title: Marketplace & prices
hero.subtitle: Local product prices, supplier directory, and direct contact

dialog.addDesc: Choose the main commodity from the list, or use "Other" to enter one manually.

toast.urlInvalid: Website URL must start with http:// or https://
toast.logoInvalid: Logo URL must be a relative path, an http(s) URL, or a data URL
toast.added: Supplier added and published in the directory

listingDetails.title: Ad Details
listingDetails.noCoordinates: Precise coordinates are not available for this ad currently.
listingDetails.ownerSystemNote: This ad is linked directly to its owner via the system, and you can send your inquiry from the designated button to reach their inbox.
listingDetails.noContact: No publicly available contact information for this ad.

listingInquiry.title: Ad Inquiry
listingInquiry.loadError: Unable to load the requested ad.
listingInquiry.isOwnerError: You cannot send an inquiry to your own ad
listingInquiry.validationError: Please enter at least your name and a message
listingInquiry.submitSuccess: Inquiry sent successfully. You can follow it in the Sent Messages tab.
listingInquiry.cardDescription: Your message will be saved and linked to the ad "{{title}}" for "{{owner}}".
listingInquiry.cardDescriptionNoOwner: Your message will be saved and linked to the ad "{{title}}".

form.name: Name *
form.messagePlaceholder: Write your question or request regarding this ad...

header.title: Ad Inquiries
header.subtitle: Track received inquiries on your ads and messages you've sent to owners all in one place.

errors.loadReceived: Unable to load received inquiries at the moment.
errors.loadSent: Unable to load sent inquiries at the moment.

empty.received: No inquiries received on your ads yet.
empty.sent: You haven't sent any inquiries yet. You can contact ad owners from the ad page itself.

inquiry.replyPlaceholder: Write your reply here to appear to the inquirer in their sent messages box...
inquiry.replyNote: The reply has been saved within this inquiry's record and can be seen by the user in the Sent Messages tab.
inquiry.noReplyYet: No reply yet. It will appear here once the owner responds, and you'll also receive platform notifications.

prices.title: Market Prices
prices.heroSubtitle: Track agricultural product prices in New Valley moment by moment
